tasks.label: Run TaxAI Backend
tasks.command: $portPids = @(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); foreach($procId in $portPids){ Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'python.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*uvicorn app.main:app*' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; cd taxai/backend; ../../.venv-2/Scripts/python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --port 8001

tasks.label: Stop TaxAI Backend
tasks.command: $portPids = @(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); foreach($procId in $portPids){ Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'python.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*uvicorn app.main:app*' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
